data.title: Hain Celestial Valuation Is Low Versus Historical Levels, But Analyst Remains Neutral - Here's Why
data.description: JP Morgan analyst lowers Hain Celestial's price target, citing weaker sales trends and concerns over EBITDA projections.

data.title: Hasbro Focuses On Adult Toy Market Amid Declining Sales: Report
data.description: Hasbro is reportedly targeting the "kidult" market to boost its growth, with 60% of its revenue now coming from customers aged 13 and older. The company's new strategy, "Playing to Win," aims for steady growth through 2027.
